stemHtml: In case of an obstacle that is within the obstacle accountability area but at some distance from the threshold, what flap setting is generally recommended?

options.a: Higher flap setting in order to achieve a greater climb gradient, accepting an increased ground-roll distance.
options.b: Lower or no flap setting in order to achieve a shorter ground-roll distance and a greater climb gradient.
options.c: Lower or no flap setting in order to achieve a greater climb gradient, accepting an increased ground-roll distance.
options.d: Higher flap setting in order to achieve a shorter ground-roll distance and a greater climb gradient.
